text: PostgreSQL connection pool exhausted on billing-service. Active connections: 200/200. Symptoms: p99 latency > 4200ms, DB connection timeout failures.
root_cause: Unreleased database connection leak inside billing-service checkout transaction routine.
resolution: Increased max_connections to 300 and applied garbage collection patch to close unreleased transaction connection blocks.

text: Memory exhaustion (OOM) on user-service. Container killed at 4096MB limit. RSS growing exponentially at 120MB/min.
root_cause: Buffer overflow and memory leak during batch serialization of user profile avatars.
resolution: Scaled container replicas and adjusted node heap parameters to enforce image compression before memory heap allocation.

text: Redis cache cluster memory reached 98% threshold on cache-router. Eviction policy failing and keys evicted: 4500/sec. Eviction storm occurring.
root_cause: Eviction policy set to volatile-lru with no TTL set on transient session keys.
resolution: Changed eviction policy to allkeys-lru and configured dynamic TTL expiry on auth tokens.

text: P99 latency spike to 6200ms on Nginx API gateway route /api/v2/checkout. Gateway threshold exceeded: 500ms.
root_cause: TCP connection saturation on outbound credit card payment service gate.
resolution: Implemented circuit breaker pattern and routed failed checkout requests to secondary fallback gateway.

text: Root disk partition full (99% capacity) on server prod-db-01. Only 45MB free space left on volume /var/log/syslog.
root_cause: Stuck debug log rotation daemon generating multi-gigabyte verbose stdout log dumps.
resolution: Executed safe log truncation script, restarted logrotate service, and updated system alert thresholds to warning at 80%.

text: Container CPU throttled at 85% on order-processor daemon. Container throttle limit hit: 1000m. Response latency degrading.
root_cause: Thread starvation in node event loop during high throughput webhook processing.
resolution: Adjusted Kubernetes cgroups resource limits to 2000m CPU limits and scaled worker replicas.

text: SSL/TLS certificate for production portal api.payment.internal expires in 48 hours. Renewal sequence failing with DNS verification errors.
root_cause: Let's Encrypt renewal failed due to misconfigured DNS CAA records blocking automation validation.
resolution: Manually patched CAA record, re-triggered Certbot automated validation daemon, and verified renewal success.

text: Kubernetes Pod CrashLoopBackOff: order-service-worker restarted 14 times in 5 minutes. Container exit code: 137 (OOMKilled).
root_cause: JVM heap size misconfigured, exceeding the Docker container RAM cgroup limit.
resolution: Adjusted JVM parameters to use -XX:+UseContainerSupport and configured max heap limit dynamically.

text: Database replication lag spiked to 480 seconds on read-replica-02. Primary database server: db-primary-01.
root_cause: Replica IO threads blocked during heavy database migration and unindexed bulk write queries.
resolution: Configured replica concurrency options and optimized bulk indexing routines to prevent IO thread contention.

text: Elasticsearch IOPS exhaustion on search-cluster-01. Average IOPS limit hit at 3000/3000. Write queue depth spiked to 120.
root_cause: Heavy write logs and unindexed documents clogging ES segments flushing routines.
resolution: Scaled index shard replicas, cleared bulk segment indexes, and increased EBS IOPS volume parameters.

text: Network partition detected between us-east-1a and us-east-1b. Internal CoreDNS query resolution failure rate spiked to 75%.
root_cause: AWS transit gateway route table corruption leading to network packet blackholing across subnets.
resolution: Re-routed traffic flow through healthy redundant subnets in us-east-1c and flushed local DNS resolver cache.

text: Unusual authentication spike: 450 failed SSH login attempts from IP 203.0.113.42 on bastion host prod-ssh-01.
root_cause: Automated brute-force botnet target scanning public port 22 access.
resolution: Blocked malicious IP source block in VPC security group rules and enforced SSH public-key only credentials.

text: Load balancer target group api-gateway-targets reports 4/6 backend instances in UNHEALTHY state. HTTP 502 Bad Gateway spiked.
root_cause: Deadlock in target group application health check controller responding with timeout.
resolution: Optimized health check ping endpoints, decoupled database checks, and restarted target instances.

text: Cassandra DB write timeout anomalies on keyspace sessions. Timeout rate spiked to 45% on node ring node-04.
root_cause: Hotspotting on a single partition key due to poorly distributed user UUID range.
resolution: Enforced composite primary keys distribution index and cleared cache memory limits on the affected Cassandra nodes.

text: RabbitMQ memory alarm triggered on broker-02. All producers blocked. Queue depth spiked to 85,000 unacknowledged messages.
root_cause: Consumer thread starvation on order processing worker service crashing during processing.
resolution: Restarted order worker services, added consumer threads, and increased RabbitMQ memory watermark limit.

text: Nginx worker connections exhausted warning on gateway-01. Current active connections: 10240/10240.
root_cause: Slow HTTP client brute-force connections leaking file descriptors.
resolution: Increased worker_connections limit to 20480 in nginx.conf and configured request limit rate guidelines.

text: AWS EBS root volume read/write latency spiked to 240ms on db-primary-01. Average disk queue length > 15.
root_cause: EBS burst balance credits fully depleted during large analytical table sweep.
resolution: Upgraded EBS volume type from gp2 to gp3 and provisioned persistent 4000 IOPS baseline capacity.

text: Kafka consumer group offset lag spiked to 125,000 on topic payments-event-stream. Consumer group payment-processor-service.
root_cause: Consumer instance failure leading to partition rebalancing storm.
resolution: Enforced partition rebalance timeouts, scaled consumer replicas, and optimized consumer commit routines.

text: Google Cloud Load Balancer reports backend service auth-backend returning HTTP 504 Gateway Timeout to 85% of traffic.
root_cause: Third-party LDAP active directory sync service outage blocking authentication calls.
resolution: Switched LDAP server endpoints to hot-standby cloud replication instances and updated sync configs.

text: Critical memory fragmentation detected in Redis cluster master-01. Memory fragmentation ratio spiked to 3.8.
root_cause: Memory allocations and frequent deallocations causing physical RAM pages segmentation.
resolution: Triggered Redis active defragmentation script config and restarted container replica.
